title: More Nonsense Limerick 38
content:
There was a young lady in blue,
    Who said, "Is it you? Is it you?"
    When they said, "Yes, it is," 
    She replied only, "Whizz!"
    That ungracious young lady in blue.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 38"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
